summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kozbeyli Konagi hotel management system Faz 2-4 features. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All 15 frontend pages navigable and functional with all new CRUD operations working correctly.

issues: Guest select dropdown placeholder shows 'Misafir secin *' but no data-testid attribute on the dropdown trigger itself (only on form inputs)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 15 pages navigable, new CRUD operations working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: TEST_Kampanya, TEST_Personel, TEST_ShiftStaff, TEST_ResGuest - automatically cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Faz 2-4 features tested and working. 19 new API endpoints tested: Campaigns (CRUD + send), Staff (CRUD), Shifts (CRUD), Reservations extended (CRUD + status flow + auto-housekeeping on checkout), Settings (get/update), KVKK (6 sections), i18n (5 languages), Foca Guide (beaches, historical, family, couple, history tabs), Hotel History (timeline). Sidebar now has 15 pages in 5 sections (GENEL, ILETISIM, OPERASYON, BILGI, SISTEM). Sidebar toggle works. Email campaign sending is MOCKED (counts guests as recipients but doesn't actually send emails).

backend_apis: PATCH /api/campaigns/{id}/status?status=sent - sends campaign, returns recipients count (MOCKED)
PATCH /api/reservations/{id} - updates reservation with status flow (pending->confirmed->checked_in->checked_out)
Auto-housekeeping creation on checkout - VERIFIED WORKING
GET /api/settings - returns settings object with all toggle options
GET /api/i18n - returns 5 languages (tr, en, de, fr, ru)
GET /api/hotel/guide - returns Foca guide with beaches, historical, activities
GET /api/hotel/history - returns hotel history with timeline
frontend_pages: Dashboard - stats, platform ratings, recent tasks (GENEL section)
Rezervasyonlar - create reservation, status filters, status flow buttons (GENEL section)
Odalar - room types with TL/EUR prices (GENEL section)
AI Asistan - chat with Gemini AI (ILETISIM section)
Kampanyalar - create/send/delete campaigns with target segments (ILETISIM section)
Kat Hizmetleri - housekeeping logs with status (OPERASYON section)
Personel - staff list with tabs for Personel/Vardiyalar (OPERASYON section)
Restoran Menu - 12 categories with prices (BILGI section)
Foca Rehberi - 5 tabs (Plajlar, Tarihi Yerler, Aile, Ciftler, Koy Tarihi) with timeline (BILGI section)
Ayarlar - toggle switches, AI config display, KVKK status (SISTEM section)
navigation: Sidebar with 15 pages in 5 categorized sections
All navigation buttons with data-testid attributes

mocked_features.email_campaigns: Campaign sending is MOCKED - counts guests in DB as recipients but doesn't actually send emails
